summary: Tested Knowledge Center tab layout, Admin module visibility toggles, and products API. All 3 features working correctly.

issues: React hydration error: nested <a> inside <a> — BriefCard renders <a href=brief.slug> wrapping a div that contains a child <a href=brief.packetHref>. This is invalid HTML and causes Next.js hydration warnings. Not a show-stopper but should be fixed.

action_items: Fix nested <a> in BriefCard in KnowledgeCenterIndex.jsx: the packetHref cross-link <a> is inside the outer <a href=brief.slug> wrapper — replace outer <a> with a <div> that uses onClick/router.push, or restructure layout to avoid nesting.
critical_code_review_comments: KnowledgeCenterIndex.jsx BriefCard: <a href={brief.slug}> wraps <div> that contains <a href={brief.packetHref}>. Nested anchors are invalid HTML causing hydration errors in Next.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Knowledge Center /knowledge-center: 3 tabs (Articles/Briefs/90-Day Series) all working with correct data-testids. Admin /admin/modules: login gate works, sidebar modules load, visibility toggle (●/○) toggles correctly and calls PATCH endpoint. Products: LP-PKT-001 through LP-PKT-005 uploaded; LP-BDL-001 and LP-LIB-001 still missing (9 total uploaded, 2 missing out of 11 products listed - original stated 10/12 but current count is 9/11).

feature_test_results.kc-tab-articles: PASS - data-testid present, shows category filter + 8 articles
feature_test_results.kc-tab-briefs: PASS - data-testid present, shows kc-brief-list with 8 briefs
feature_test_results.kc-tab-series: PASS - data-testid present, shows kc-90day-series with timeline
feature_test_results.admin-module-sidebar: PASS - all 10 modules visible in sidebar
feature_test_results.visibility-toggle-ground-0: PASS - ○ → ● toggle works, calls PATCH endpoint
feature_test_results.visibility-toggle-all-modules: PASS - all modules have module-visibility-toggle-{id} testids
feature_test_results.products-missing: LP-BDL-001 and LP-LIB-001 still missing as expected
